resources.string:
Knowmad-Specific Extended iCalendar Exchange Format, based on the iCalendar 2.0 standard defined in RFC 5545
## General Rules
- Each `VEVENT` does not require a `UID` - Must include the semester attribute `%1$s` - If the event belongs to a course, must include the course attribute `%2$s` - For recurrence rules:
- Write an `RRULE` for the `VEVENT` to create recurring events - It is recommended to include an ending condition such as `COUNT` or `UNTIL`, and events occurring after the semester end time will not be added
- Must set `DTSTART` and one ending indicator (`DURATION` or `DTEND`, choose one) - Only supports `VALARM` with `DISPLAY`
## Time Zone and Time
- Prefer using `TZID` to specify time zone - If no time zone is specified, use the `Z` suffix to indicate UTC time
## Required/Recommended VEVENT Properties
- Required: `DTSTART`, `%1$s` - At least one of: `DURATION`, `DTEND` - For regular events, required: `SUMMARY` (event name), `LOCATION`. In course events, if not specified, these will be parsed from course information. - For course events, required: `%5$s` - Optional: `%8$s`, `RRULE`, `EXDATE`, `LOCATION`, `COLOR`, `VALARM`, `DESCRIPTION`, `PRIORITY`
## Custom Attributes
### %1$s
- Value: UUID, it is recommended to leave blank - Required parameters: - `LABEL`: Semester name - `%2$s`: Semester start date (`YYYY-MM-DD`) - `%3$s`: Semester end date (`YYYY-MM-DD`, exclusive) - `%4$s`: Semester time zone ID
Example (ID left blank):
``` %1$s;LABEL=My Semester;%2$s=2000-01-01;%3$s=2020-01-01;%4$s=Asia/Shanghai: ```
### %5$s
- Value: UUID, it is recommended to leave blank - Required parameters: - `LABEL`: Course name - `%6$s`: Default instructor name for the course - `%7$s`: Default location for the course
Example (ID left blank):
``` %5$s;LABEL=My Course;%6$s=The Instructor;%7$s=The Room: ```
### %8$s
- Value: Text, instructor\'s name
